message:
feat(codegen): Migrate subscript.zig and calls.zig to ExprEmitter

Migrate labeled block patterns to use ExprEmitter for safer
parenthesization and block management:

- subscript.zig: 16 block usages migrated
  - base_is_block wrapping
  - pyval_key PyValue dispatch
  - idx_ array/list indexing with bounds checking
  - str_ string indexing for char slices
  - arr_ array indexing with ArrayList detection
  - slice_ all slicing patterns (bytes, tuple, pyvalue, bounds)

- calls.zig: 2 patterns migrated
  - mcall_ method call wrapping for block expressions
  - unpack_ starred expression tuple unpacking

- expr_emitter.zig: Add startBreak() and getCodegen() helpers
  for complex patterns where break value requires multiple emit calls

Note: test_binop compile error is pre-existing (log.append issue)
